allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\new\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'flex-1 px-3|border rounded-xl text-sm font-bold|designationType|nomination_type|指名' | Select-Object -First 30")

Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\[id]\\edit\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'designationTypes\\.map|payment_method.*cash|options_payment_method|flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 border' | Select-Object LineNumber, Line")

Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\new\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 flex|text-xs font-semibold text-slate-600 mb|text-sm font-bold text-slate-800 mb-3|space-y-1\\.5 text-xs' | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap")

Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\new\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'select|TimeSelect|課目|セラピスト選択' | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap | Select-Object -First 30")

Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\[id]\\edit\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'className=\\"w-full px-.*bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg focus|className=\\"w-full px-.*bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus.*text-sm' | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap")
Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -LiteralPath 'app\\reservations\\new\\page.tsx' -Pattern 'text-sm' | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap | Select-Object -First 20")
